filtered.title: To activate a MOB, select the MOB icon (1) in the quick access
filtered.snippet: To activate a MOB, select the MOB icon (1) in the quick access menu to immediately create a MOB waypoint at your vessel’s current location and begin. Alternatively, open the MOB app (2). This automatically creates a MOB waypoint at your ves
